mapper.update: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE ${tableName} ( tag_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, unassigned_count INT NOT NULL, platform_type TINYINT NOT NULL, country_data_json TEXT NOT NULL, snapshot_time DATETIME NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (tag_name, platform_type) )
mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO ${tableName} (tag_name,unassigned_count, country_data_json, platform_type, snapshot_time) VALUES
(#{item.tagName},#{item.unassignedCount}, #{item.countryDataJson}, #{item.platformType}, #{item.snapshotTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE kol_tags k JOIN ${tableName} t ON k.tag_name = t.tag_name AND k.platform_type = t.platform_type SET k.country_data_json = t.country_data_json, k.snapshot_time = t.snapshot_time
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM kol_tag_attribute_relation WHERE (tag_id, product_id) IN
(#{item.tagId}, #{item.productId})
